ordinary_no_progress_guard.fingerprint: ordinary|critical (none) major - app/admin/page.tsx:169 — campaign numeric validation accepts `infinity`/huge scientific notation, allowing campaigns that can award infinite balances. fix: validate `amountperclaim`, `totalallocation`, and duration with `number.isfinite(...)` plus sane min/max bounds. - app/airdrop/page.tsx:95 — `date.now()` is called during render and `npm run lint` fails under react 19 purity rules. fix: derive `now` from a stable client clock hook/snapshot outside render-pure calculation. - lib/store.ts:369 — `usehydrated()` synchronously sets state in an effect and `npm run lint` fails under react 19 hooks rules. fix: use zustand persist hydration callbacks or a `usesyncexternalstore` hydration snapshot instead of `sethydrated(true)` in an effect. - components/themetoggle.tsx:11 — theme mount state synchronously sets state in an effect and `npm run lint` fails. fix: initialize from a client-safe external theme store/snapshot or refactor to avoid effect-driven mount state. - lib/store.ts:227 — `removeliquidity` dereferences `pool_map[poolid]` without guarding stale persisted positions, causing crashes after pool-id changes. fix: return `{ ok:false }` when `!pool` before reading `pool.token0`. - app/pools/page.tsx:50 — persisted positions with unknown `poolid` crash the pools page at `pool.token0`. fix: filter/skip positions whose pool is missing before rendering. - app/portfolio/page.tsx:187 — persisted positions with unknown `poolid` crash the portfolio page. fix: guard `pool_map[p.poolid]` and omit or label stale positions. minor - lib/store.ts:188 — lp `sharepct` is accumulated against static `pool.tvlusd`, so repeated deposits show mathematically wrong pool share. fix: recompute share from total user position and effective pool tvl, or update mock pool tvl consistently. - lib/mock-data.ts:122 — ioi mock token address contains non-hex characters, despite evm-style address comments/ui. fix: replace it with a valid 40-hex-character `0x...` mock address. - app/admin/page.tsx:186 — negative/scientific duration input can create already-ended or absurdly long campaigns. fix: require finite positive integer days within a demo-safe range. - components/tokenselectmodal.tsx:35 — token picker modal lacks `role="dialog"`, `aria-modal`, escape handling, and focus trapping. fix: add dialog semantics and keyboard dismissal/focus management. - components/marketsection.tsx:95 — clickable token table rows are not keyboard accessible. fix: use buttons/links inside cells or add keyboard handlers and focus semantics.
